title: Pilgrim International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pilgrim International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Pilgrim International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pilgrim International Enterprises:
Pilgrim International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim International Enterprises!
